items.title: Nancy Guthrie's family offers $1m reward to bring home missing mother
items.description: Fighting back tears, the missing woman's NBC host daughter says they accept she may be dead.

items.title: Moscow rail hub explosion was suicide bomb, Russian officials say
items.description: A traffic police officer and the suspect were killed in the explosion, Russian officials say.

items.title: Mexico hunts 23 inmates sprung from jail during wave of violence
items.description: The prisoners escaped from a jail in Puerto Vallarta after armed men rammed one of the gates.

items.title: Hong Kong lodges 'strong protest' after Panama takes control of canal ports
items.description: Last month, Panama's Supreme Court cancelled the contracts of a Hong Kong based firm that allowed it to operate the ports.

items.title: More than 5,000 flights cancelled as US east coast digs out of record snow
items.description: A major snowstorm dumps more than a foot of snow in several areas, bringing power cuts and disruption.
